verses.translation_pt: O que é o grande desastre?

verses.translation: And what can make you know what is the Striking Calamity
verses.translation_pt: Como saberá você o que é o Grande Desastre?

verses.translation: It is the Day when people will be like moths, dispersed
verses.translation_pt: No dia, as pessoas serão como insetos espalhados.

verses.translation: And the mountains will be like wool, fluffed up
verses.translation_pt: As montanhas serão como lã esfiapada.

verses.translation: Then as for one whose scales are heavy [with good deeds]
verses.translation_pt: Aquele cujas boas ações pesarem muito…

verses.translation: He will be in a pleasant life
But as for one whose scales are light
verses.translation_pt: E quem tiver pouca importância nas obras.

verses.translation: His refuge will be an abyss
And what can make you know what that is
verses.translation_pt: E como saberás o que ela é?

verses.translation: It is a Fire, intensely hot
